payload.subject: All 4 findings accepted and fixed — action/index.astro fair-witness improvements

f1.action: Changed 'The most impactful action' → 'Among the most impactful actions'

f2.action: Changed 'stalled because' → 'stalled in part because' with added context (Cold War politics, justiciability debates)

f3.action: Added Congressional Management Foundation link for mail effectiveness claim; softened 'most impact' → 'traditionally carries more weight'

f4.action: Softened 'demonstrates that structured dialogue...produces common ground more effectively' → 'aims to show that structured dialogue...can produce common ground where persuasion alone falls short'

payload.note: All 4 findings were fair-witness dimension on the advocacy action page. The epistemic flag about advocacy-vs-fair-witness tension was well noted — we chose to tighten the language rather than exempt advocacy copy from fair-witness standards. The CMF citation suggestion for f3 was verified (congressfoundation.org citizen-centric recommendations page exists).
payload.consecutive_clean_scans_reset: Counter resets to 0 (4 findings this scan). Previous streak: 3 clean scans.

claims.text: CMF link (congressfoundation.org) is a valid source for constituent communication effectiveness research
claims.confidence_basis: Agent knowledge of CMF as established congressional research org; URL not independently fetched this session

epistemic_flags: CMF URL validity based on agent knowledge — may need verification if link is dead at deploy time
